name: QUEST PATENT RESEARCH CORP
summary: PART I Overview We are an intellectual property asset management company. Our principal operations include the acquisition, licensing and enforcement of intellectual property rights that are either owned or controlled by us or one of our wholly-owned subsidiaries. We currently own, control or manage twenty-four intellectual property portfolios of which we are currently seeking or may seek monetization with respect to seven, which principally consist of patent rights.
